title: Molten Umami Australian Italian Portobello Mushroom Pizza
description: A plant-based Australian Italian dish featuring umami flavors and a lacquer glaze, perfect for a brunch mood. This recipe combines the richness of mushrooms with the brightness of Italian seasoning.

ingredients.name: Portobello mushrooms
ingredients.notes: stems removed and caps sliced 1/2 inch thick

instructions: Preheat the oven to 425 degrees Fahrenheit.
Roll out the pizza dough to a thickness of 1/4 inch.
Transfer the dough to a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Brush the dough with olive oil and sprinkle with Italian seasoning.
Arrange the sliced mushrooms on the dough, leaving a 1/2 inch border around the edges.
Drizzle the lacquer glaze over the mushrooms.
Sprinkle the vegan mozzarella shreds over the mushrooms.
Dot the umami paste over the mozzarella shreds.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Bake the pizza in the preheated oven for 20 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown and the cheese is melted and bubbly.
